mapper.select: SELECT '3' AS tradeType, uptr.order_no AS orderNo, uptr.created_time AS tradeTime, uptr.target_amount AS tradeAmout, '1' AS tradeStatus, 'platform_transfer' AS tradeWayType, uptr.transfer_rate AS exchangeRate FROM user_platform_transfer_record uptr WHERE uptr.user_id = #{vo.userId} AND uptr.updated_time >= #{vo.startTime} AND uptr.updated_time <= #{vo.endTime}
select count(*) as count from user_platform_transfer_record where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
